title: Failure Classification and Retry Budgets · Guided Systems Studio
summary: A Go pairing room incrementally implements a typed Go failure and retry policy, first with deterministic values and then with a changed failure, while keeping prior messaging invariants active. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a typed Go failure and retry policy while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Classify wrapped Go failures with errors.Is and errors.As, then combine typed cause evidence with bounded attempt, age, delay, cancellation, and terminal disposition.
Bound attempts, total age, delay, processing deadline, queue residence, and operator escalation as one retry budget; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Apply exponential backoff and jitter without blocking consumer slots or requeueing hot loops and preserve intended availability time; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Transient Permanent Ambiguous
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop Go messaging team handles case 4798 during race-enabled integration test with duplicate delivery. Build deterministic Go evidence to classify failures and enforce attempt, age, delay, and terminal retry budgets; allow exactly one terminal acknowledgement owner; then close the owning channel before one delivery decision. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Classify wrapped Go failures with errors.Is and errors.As, then combine typed cause evidence with bounded attempt, age, delay, cancellation, and terminal disposition.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Transient Permanent Ambiguous.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for classify wrapped go failures with errors.is and errors.as, then combine typed cause evidence with bounded attempt, age, delay, cancellation, and terminal disposition. For RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Transient Permanent Ambiguous, keep Transient Permanent Ambiguous connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.
